This subfamily is further divided into several tribes, and Platycorynoides epipactidea is a member of the tribe Vanilleae. The tribe Vanilleae is primarily composed of epiphytic orchids that are native to tropical regions. Further classification would involve examining the genus and species levels, but Platycorynoides epipactidea is generally placed within the Orchidaceae family.
